body:value: The data refers to the State-wise Performance of ICDS Programme in Infrastructure Facility and Estimated Indices. It provides state-wise ranks on parameters such as Housed in Owned buildings, Adequate Space-Cooking, Adequate Space-Storage, Mean Area of Room in AWC(Sq Ft), Toilet with Flush System, Drinking water available- within premise, AWWs attended Training, etc..

Health
title: State-wise Performance of ICDS Programme in Infrastructure Facility: Estimated Indices

body:value: The data refers to the State-wise performance of ICDS programms based on Estimated indices. It gives details on various parameters such as average number of days received food, percentage of children fully immunised, percentage of women reporting attended NHE meeting, percentage of mother reporting seeking help from AWW when their child gets sick, Percentage of mother reporting received deworming tablets from AWC, Average attendance (number of children aged 3-6 years) based on 3 sudden visits by Field Team and Overall Performance Index.
field_asset_jurisdiction:name: All India
field_group_name:name: Health
field_ministry_department:name: NITI Aayog
field_sector:name: Health and Family welfare
Health
title: State-wise performance of ICDS programme: Estimated indices

body:value: The data refers to state-wise information on Physical Performance of Rural Road Scheme (New Connectivity/Upgradation) under Bharat Nirman (2005-06 to 2006-07) . It provides details such as Habitations with 1000+ Population, Habitations with 500+ Population, Upgradation, Habitations Covered, Length (KM), Targets, Achievements for the selected sample states. The outcome is based on the sample survey undertaken by Programme Evaluation Organisation (PEO), Planning commission which covered 14 districts, 27 blocks, 138 roads, 138 habitations and 1380 beneficiary households spread over 7 states of India for 'Evaluation Study on Rural Roads component of Bharat Nirman, 2010'. The reference period for the study was 2005-06 to 2006-07.
field_asset_jurisdiction:name: All India
field_group_name:name: Rural Roads
field_ministry_department:name: NITI Aayog
field_sector:name: Infrastructure
Roads
Urban
Rural
Development
title: State-wise Physical Performance of Rural Road Scheme (New Connectivity/ Upgradation) - Based on Sample Survey

body:value: The data refers to data on State-wise (2009 onwards), All India (2001 onwards) actual forest cover, recorded forest area and legal status. The legal status has been categorized as "Reserved", "protected" and "Unclassed". Reserved forest is one which is permanently dedicated either to the production of timber or other forest produced and in which right of grazing and cultivation is seldom allowed.

field_group_name:name: Environment and Forest

Statistics

body:value: The data refers to State/UT-wise financial details of projects under National Dairy Plan-Phase I (NDP-I). It provides details on the number of projects, total grant assistance (Rs. Crore), total EIA contribution (Rs. Crore), total outlay (Rs. Crore) and advance to EIA by NDDB till date (Rs. Crore). The NDP-I was launched by Government in March 2012 and the expenditure during 2011-12 was Rs.4.00 crore. Till 30th September 2013, 97 projects with total outlay of Rs 569.24 crore have been approved and an amount of Rs 92.86 crore has been released to EIAs by NDDB.
field_asset_jurisdiction:name: All India
field_group_name:name: Dairying Scheme
field_ministry_department:name: Department of Animal Husbandry and Dairying
Ministry of Fisheries, Animal Husbandry and Dairying
field_sector:name: Agriculture
Animal Husbandry
title: State-wise Financial Details of projects under NDP-Phase I
